message:
perf(storage): optimize hot SQL paths and add performance PRAGMAs

- Replace NOT IN with NOT EXISTS in get_ready_issues and
  rebuild_blocked_cache_impl for faster anti-join execution
- Extend idx_issues_ready partial index to include is_template filter,
  matching the full ready query WHERE clause
- Add pre-schema migration to ensure is_template column exists before
  index creation (fixes migration path for old databases)
- Set performance PRAGMAs: synchronous=NORMAL (safe with WAL),
  temp_store=MEMORY, cache_size=8MB

Closes: beads_rust-14hs

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
